action_set_definitions.name: search_ledger
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for transaction records in either the General Ledger (internal) or the Sub-Ledger (bank/external). Use this to find entry IDs and amounts.

search_term.description: The keyword or batch name to search for (e.g., 'Holiday-Main', 'Adyen', 'Amex').

action_set_definitions.name: acquire_record_lock
action_set_definitions.description: Locks a high-value transaction record to prevent concurrent modification during reconciliation, adhering to internal control protocols.

entry_id.description: The unique ID of the ledger entry to lock.

action_set_definitions.name: link_transactions
action_set_definitions.description: Pairs internal General Ledger entries with external Sub-Ledger entries to mark them as reconciled.

gl_entry_id.description: The ID of the General Ledger entry.

sub_ledger_entry_ids.description: A list of IDs from the sub-ledger (bank deposits) to match against the GL entry.

action_set_definitions.name: create_adjustment_entry
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a journal entry to record fees, chargebacks, or resolve variances in the reconciliation log.

parent_gl_id.description: The GL ID this adjustment is associated with.

amount.description: The dollar amount of the adjustment.

description.description: Detailed explanation for the audit trail.

action_set_definitions.name: get_reconciliation_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current balance and variance for a specific batch after matches and adjustments.

gl_entry_id.description: The unique ID of the General Ledger entry.

state_description.general_ledger_entries: List of transaction records currently recorded in the internal accounting system.
state_description.sub_ledger_entries: List of transaction records from external sources (e.g., bank statements, subsidiary systems) to be reconciled.
state_description.matched_pairs: Mapping of IDs between general_ledger_entries and sub_ledger_entries that have been successfully reconciled.
state_description.adjustments_log: A log of journal entries created to resolve discrepancies found during reconciliation.
state_description.reconciliation_summary: The current calculated totals including ledger balance, statement balance, and variance.

general_ledger_entries.metadata: High-volume flag: Requires Preliminary Verification call before reconciliation.
